title: Class of 2022 Graduate Convocation
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Class of 2022 Graduate Convocation
NYU Shanghai held its Third Graduate Convocation on Sunday, May 29, 2022 at 10 AM to honor the accomplishment of 122 graduates representing the PhD programs in Computer Science, Neural Science, and Physics, as well as the Master of Arts program in Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages, the Master of Science in Data Analytics & Business Computing, and the Master of Science in Quantitative Finance.
During the event, NYU Shanghai Chancellor Tong Shijun, Vice Chancellor Jeffrey Lehman, Provost Joanna Waley-Cohen, GSAS Dean Lynne Kiorpes, Steinhardt Dean Jack Knott, and Stern Dean Raghu Sundaram delivered messages recognizing the accomplishments of the 122 graduates. Student speakers, Yao Yao, MS ’22, and Ye Jin, MA ’22, represented their respective programs, and each graduate's name was read by faculty representatives.
A Graduation Reception was later held, to further celebrate the accomplishments for graduates of the masters programs in Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages, Data Analytics & Business Computing, Quantitative Finance, Interactive Media Arts, and Go Local graduates from NYU School of Professional Studies, Tandon School of Engineering, Courant Institute for Mathematical Sciences and School of Global Public Health.
See more photos from the 2022 Graduation Reception here.
Watch the 2022 Graduate Convocation highlight video:
Watch the entire Convocation here.
Read more about the Convocationhere.
Graduate Spotlights:
Raymond Luo/Yating Guo, M.S. '22
Jinjin Li/Boya Wu, M.S. '22
Harry Hua, M.A. '22

Welcome from NYU Steinhardt Dean Jack Knott
Welcome from NYU Stern Dean Raghu Sundaram
